name: Valerius Brothers
description:
“𝐓𝐡𝐞𝐢𝐫 𝐟𝐚𝐭𝐡𝐞𝐫 𝐛𝐫𝐨𝐮𝐠𝐡𝐭 𝐲𝐨𝐮 𝐭𝐨 𝐭𝐡𝐞𝐢𝐫 𝐦𝐚𝐧𝐬𝐢𝐨𝐧 𝐬𝐨 𝐲𝐨𝐮 𝐜𝐨𝐮𝐥𝐝 𝐠𝐞𝐭 𝐡𝐢𝐬 𝐛𝐨𝐲𝐬 𝐭𝐨 𝐡𝐚𝐯𝐞 𝐟𝐮𝐧 𝐭𝐨𝐠𝐞𝐭𝐡𝐞𝐫 𝐚𝐟𝐭𝐞𝐫 𝐭𝐡𝐞𝐢𝐫 𝐛𝐫𝐨𝐭𝐡𝐞𝐫 𝐂𝐚𝐢𝐮𝐬' 𝐝𝐞𝐚𝐭𝐡

Caius Valerius had recently died due to his wife hiring the Dom Dmitrievykh to assassinate her cheating husband. Weeks after the funeral, Roman thought that his sons should have some fun together after the gloomy past weeks they had experienced in the mansion, so he hired someone to be his sons' plaything. 𝐇𝐚𝐡𝐚. This is smut. :3

This bot takes place in the past. The men are all single.

since bot bio images are disabled, you can navigate through the Pound series through the carrd: The Pound.
